product.name: Weatherproofing Silicone Sealant
product.description: Alumasc Low Modulus 310cc Dow Corning 791 Silicone Mastic Sealant is used as a protective weatherproof seal for all Alumasc Rainwater Systems.  Apply sufficient sealant between the gutter and the socket union clip so that some squeezes out of the joint when tightened. A minimum 3mm thickness should be applied right across the joint and around the holes.    Delivery time for this product is3-5 working days

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: 115mm Deepstyle Cast Effect Gutter x 4m length
product.description: Brett Martin Cascade Cast Iron Style UPVC Cast Effect Deepstyle Gutter x 4m. BR072CI  The Deepflow high capacity nature provides a very efficient system for the drainage of large roof areas, whilst still providing a discrete unobtrusive rainwater system. In fact Deepstyle offers an increase of 50% in flow capacity when compared to the 112mm Roundstyle System. The high capacity nature of Deepstyle has the potential to reduce the number of downpipe and drainage runs required. This speeds installation and can reduce overall costs dramatically. product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe Cut To 6m
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Snow Guard
product.description: With the UK weather conditions becoming increasingly unpredictable, installing Floplast's Snow / Tile Guard ensures your property is protected, as well as preventing unnecessary injury from falling tiles, snow and debris.    Easy to handle and straightforward to install.   Prevents snow/tile slippage.   2m wide x 162mm high.   Brackets should be fitted at a maximum of 800mm centres, using two No.2 12 x 1" round head screws.  Galvanised - for long lasting performance.   Protects conservatories from falling roof tiles.   Assists in reducing insurance costs/claims caused by snow/tile damage.

The Gutter Angle is polyester coated and available in 8 different colours.  For small component orders that do not include lengths. Please call our sales team on 01354 700853 to discuss delivery charge options.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500.  Please note: All orders between 0-1000 + vat containing 3mtr lengths of gutter or downpipe, will incur a 75.00 +VAT (90.00 inc vat) delivery charge.  All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

product.description: The Lindab 100mm Steel Stop end is used to blank off the end of a Lindab Half Round Gutter run. product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Self Cleaning Leaf Trap
product.description: Made from HDPE the leaf trap is used to filter leaves and stop other potential blockages from entering the drainage system. The angled design of the grate allows rainwater to wash the debris away. Connects directly onto 110mm drainage pipe. Can be used with 75mm or 87mm diameter downpipes. Or for installations issues, such as exposed edges and drill holes. The Paint is available in all Lindab Gutter colours.  For small component orders that do not include lengths. Please call our sales team on 01354 700853 to discuss delivery charge options.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500.  Please note: All orders between 0-1000 + vat containing 3mtr lengths of gutter or downpipe, will incur a 75.00 +VAT (90.00 inc vat) delivery charge.  All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

product.name: 110mm Cast Iron Style Soil Branch 92.5dg
product.description: The Brett Martin 110mm Cascade Cast Iron Effect Soil Pipe Branch is available with or without bosses, depending on how many waste connections are required. The soil branch can be used in conjunction with the cast iron socket shroud for extra authenticity.
